detail.description:
The return of Director Kim Tae-gon, creator of *Merchant* and *Imjinrok*.

Into the heart of that massive battlefield, seven years into the Imjin War!

Along with legendary names such as Yi Sun-sin, Kim Si-min, and Ryu Seong-ryong,

It is your turn to change the course of history.

※ Game Features ※

▶ The 1592 Imjin War with Real-Life Heroes

✔ A grand assembly of real-life heroes including Yi Sun-sin, Kim Si-min, and Ryu Seong-ryong
